title: TUI: sealed_deliver passes empty string as from_pub_id to decrypt_and_display
description: tui/src/event.rs handle_relay_event for SEALED_DELIVER calls decrypt_and_display(state, "", &plaintext) — the empty string for from_pub_id. decrypt_and_display uses from_pub_id as the 'effective_from' fallback when MLS is inactive, meaning sealed messages arriving before MLS activation are attributed to an empty pub_id string. In the MLS-active path, effective_from comes from mls.process_incoming — correct. But there is a window: the guard at line 389 says 'Drop sealed messages that arrive before our Welcome', but MLS is checked after the unseal — if mls_active is false the message is dropped but decrypt_and_display has already been called (it returns Ok(()) for None from process_incoming when inactive). The empty from_pub_id is only used in the fallback path but the fallback produces a display_name of the empty string which renders as an 8-char ellipsis (display_name('') returns '' since len is not > 8).
